scene_overview.title: The Kidnapping Overview
scene_overview.text: A dark figure approaches the house... Victor has come for the baby. This is a moment of pure danger and terror...

scene_kidnapping.title: The Kidnapping
scene_kidnapping.text: Victor bursts through the door. He takes the baby away. Ethan is gone. The family is in despair. This is a disaster they could never have imagined...

scene_intro.title: The Kidnapping Overview
scene_intro.text: Victor has kidnapped Ethan, the baby. The family's only hope lies with David. He must choose his path carefully.

scene_1.title: Amara's Plea
scene_1.text: Victor came to the house. He took my Ethan away. He says he'll only return him if I give him everything I have. David, I don't have much time. You're my only hope. Please, find my baby and bring him back safely.

scene_police_intro.title: David Calls for Help
scene_police_intro.text: I'm calling the police. We need professional help and official authority to take down Victor. Let's work within the system to save Ethan.

scene_police_station_intro.title: At the Police Station
scene_police_station_intro.text: We're mobilizing all available units. Our detective will lead the investigation. We have experience with cases like this.

scene_detective_brief.title: The Detective's Task
scene_detective_brief.text: We need evidence. Help us collect clues to build an airtight case against Victor. Find phone records, fingerprints, and witness statements at the police station. The more evidence we gather, the closer we get to Ethan.

scene_trace_intro.title: David Traces the Signal
scene_trace_intro.text: I know someone who can help. A tech specialist who can trace Victor's phone signal. It's risky, but it's faster than waiting for police bureaucracy. Ethan doesn't have time to waste.

scene_tech_specialist_intro.title: The Tech Specialist
scene_tech_specialist_intro.text: I've got the equipment ready. We can trace Victor's phone signal by decrypting his communications. It's complex work, but I know how to do it. Let's get to work.

scene_trace_brief.title: The Decryption Task
scene_trace_brief.text: We can trace Victor's signal through his phone communications. Decrypt the data by matching signal patterns and phone records. The more we decrypt, the closer we locate Victor's position. Every match brings us closer to Ethan.

scene_alone_intro.title: Going Solo
scene_alone_intro.text: I can't wait for police. I can't trust this to tech specialists. Ethan is my responsibility. I'm going alone into Victor's compound. Victor won't expect help coming from inside his own security perimeter.

scene_alone_preparation.title: Preparing for Infiltration
scene_alone_preparation.text: I need to navigate through Victor's compound carefully. There will be bombs, chains, locked doors, and mechanical traps everywhere. I have limited lives - if I make too many mistakes, I'll be captured. Every move must be calculated. I must reach Ethan without alerting Victor.

scene_2_police.title: Building the Case
scene_2_police.text: Good progress! We're building a solid case. Continue gathering evidence. Each clue brings us closer to understanding Victor's location and operations.

scene_2_trace.title: Signal Getting Stronger
scene_2_trace.text: We're making progress! The signal is becoming clearer. Continue decrypting the communication patterns. Victor is using an old factory as his base - we can pinpoint it soon.

scene_2_alone.title: Into the Compound
scene_2_alone.text: I'm inside the perimeter. The compound is filled with dangers - explosives, mechanical traps, and locked doors. I need to be strategic about every move. Ethan must be kept safe somewhere in this facility.

scene_victory_police.title: Victor's Location Found!
scene_victory_police.text: Excellent work! We've gathered enough evidence to locate Victor's factory hideout. The police are ready to move in. But Victor knows we're coming. He's prepared traps and obstacles. We need David to reach Ethan first!

scene_victory_trace.title: Signal Traced Successfully!
scene_victory_trace.text: We've successfully traced Victor's signal! He's operating from an old industrial factory on the outskirts of the city. The building is filled with complex locks and security systems. We need to bypass them carefully.

scene_victory_alone.title: Ethan's Location!
scene_victory_alone.text: I've navigated through all the traps and reached the inner chambers of the factory. I can hear Ethan crying! Victor has a final series of obstacles between me and my son. I must solve these last puzzles carefully.

scene_factory_police.title: Factory Rescue - Police Route
scene_factory_police.text: We've breached the factory gates with backup. Victor's inner compound is filled with locks and security systems. David, you need to navigate through the final obstacles while we hold the perimeter. Ethan is close!

scene_factory_trace.title: Factory Infiltration - Tech Route
scene_factory_trace.text: Using our hacking skills, we've disabled most of the electronic locks. But Victor has manual backup systems and traps. You need to solve these physical puzzles to reach Ethan's location. Hurry!

scene_final_alone.title: Victor's Final Challenge
scene_final_alone.text: You made it further than expected, David! But your journey ends here. I have one final game for you. Solve these puzzles, and you can have your son. Fail, and Ethan stays with me forever.

scene_final_confrontation.title: Face to Face
scene_final_confrontation.text: You've solved the final puzzle! Victor's security system is offline, and his compound is crumbling around him. Ethan is safe in the secure chamber. Victor attempts one last escape, but the police are closing in.

scene_ending.title: Ethan is Safe!
scene_ending.text: After an incredible rescue mission, Ethan is finally safe in your arms. Victor has been apprehended by authorities. The family is reunited, and peace is restored. You are a hero!
